cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: Feint

cards.duringText: Subtract 1 from the value of this card for each stormtrooper not on the board.
cards.title: Strength of the empire

cards.duringText: If your fighter is attacking an adjacent fighter, this card's value is 4 instead.
cards.title: Accuracy

cards.basicText: Place Darth Vader in any space in his zone. Recover 2 health.
cards.title: Bacta tank

cards.afterText: Choose an empty space in this fighter's zone. Place this fighter in that space.
cards.title: Force jump

cards.afterText: If you lost the combat, your opponent discards cards equal to the difference in card values.
cards.title: Force choke

cards.afterText: If the opposing fighter started this turn in a different space they may discard 1 card. If they do not you may draw 1 card.
cards.title: I find your lack of faith disturbing

cards.duringText: This card's value is equal to the amount of card's in your opponent's hand.
cards.title: Form 5

cards.duringText: If your opponent didn't play a defense card, this card's value is 0 instead.
cards.title: Altering the deal

cards.immediateText: Move each of your other stormtroopers up to 3 spaces.
cards.title: Rebels! Blast em!

cards.basicText: Shuffle your discard pile. Draw 3 cards from your discard pile and add them to the bottom of your deck in any order.
cards.title: New ways to motivate them

cards.basicText:
Choose 2 different effects:
• Return 1 Stormtrooper to a space in Darth Vader's zone. 
• Draw 2 cards.
• Gain 1 action.
cards.title: Imperial order

cards.duringText: If the opponent started this turn in a different space, you may BLIND BOOST this card.
cards.title: You don't know the power of the dark side

cards.afterText: If Darth Vader played this card, deal 1 damage to the opposing fighter per space the opponent moved this turn. If a stormtrooper played this card, draw 1 card.
cards.title: Destroy the rebel scum

hero.name: Darth Vader
hero.specialAbility: At the beginning of your turn, you may move 1 fighter in your zone (other than Darth Vader) up to 2 spaces.

name: Darth Vader
note: May the force be with you.
